data.title: MLCworks merges with EisnerAmper, specializing in marketing and business growth solutions, closing the combination in early January.
data.description: A business advisory firm, EisnerAmper, headquartered in New York, shared news on January 15, 2026, that it has joined forces with MLCworks, a specialized digital marketing and business growth advisory firm. This merger was finalized in early January, combining the expertise and resources of both companies. EisnerAmper continues to expand its global reach and strengthen its position in the market through strategic partnerships.

data.title: Gap Inc. names Pam Kaufman as Chief Entertainment Officer. Kaufman will report to Gap Inc. CEO, Richard Dickson.
data.description: Gap Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: GAP), recently disclosed the selection of Pam Kaufman as the Executive Vice President and Chief Entertainment Officer on January 15, 2026, in San Francisco. This newly established position will have Kaufman reporting directly to the President and CEO of Gap Inc., Richard Dickson.

data.title: Huggies donates 15M diapers to National Diaper Bank Network in 15 days to mark 15th anniversary.
data.description: In Chicago on January 15, 2026, Huggies®, a brand under Kimberly-Clark, has joined forces with the National Diaper Bank Network (NDBN) to distribute 15 million donated Huggies diapers within a span of 15 days in honor of the 15-year milestone of the national nonprofit. This significant contribution...

data.title: Honda's U.S. Sales HQ in Southern California achieves CarbonNeutral® Certification, cuts 2,000+ metric tons of emissions.
data.description: In Southern California, the Honda U.S. sales headquarters has become the inaugural Honda site in North America to attain CarbonNeutral® building Certification. By achieving this milestone, the campus has successfully lessened its annual emissions by more than 2,000 metric tons. Situated in Torrance, Calif., the corporate campus is recognized as the premier Honda "Innovation Site," leading the way in driving new sustainability initiatives.

data.title: Free 60-min webinar by ClassDojo for K-12 leaders on improving school-to-home communication on Jan 27, 2026, at 11 AM ET.
data.description: Join ClassDojo for a free 60-minute Learn with Leaders webinar tailored for Districts on January 27, 2026, at 11:00 AM ET. This webinar is specifically crafted to assist district and school leaders in managing increased demands for trust, visibility, and consistency in communicating school-to-home.

data.title: CAPTRUST releases results of 2026 Financial Wellness Survey, highlighting impact of financial stress on employee performance.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by CAPTRUST Financial Advisors in Raleigh, North Carolina, has revealed insightful data on the effects of financial stress on employee performance. Published on January 15, 2026, the report sheds light on the significant impact of financial wellness on employees. The survey focuses on identifying strategies for plan sponsors to alleviate financial stress among employees. The findings emphasize the importance of addressing financial concerns in the workplace. The report provides valuable insights for organizations looking to improve employee performance and well-being.

data.title: Galaxy doubles Helios data center power capacity to over 1.6GW, positioning as a multi-gigawatt AI campus.
data.description: Galaxy Digital Inc. has received approval, marking a significant milestone in its transformation into a multi-gigawatt AI data center campus. This development bolsters Galaxy's long-term strategy. The company, a global pioneer in digital assets and data center management, is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GLXY and on the TSX under the same ticker. This evolution signifies a strategic shift towards harnessing larger capacities, indicating the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the digital assets sector.

data.title: ConnectDER's IslandDER approved by Arizona's 3 largest utilities for faster installation of solar, battery backup, and EV charging.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Phoenix, ConnectDER, a prominent company specializing in meter socket adapters for solar, battery storage, and electric vehicle charging setups, revealed that its latest product, IslandDER™, has been authorized for deployment by the three major utility companies in Arizona.

data.title: Lightpath's AI-driven awards increased by 240%, reaching a total contract value of $362M. They have a $6.4B sales pipeline across 10 US markets.
data.description: A fiber infrastructure provider is making progress on a sales pipeline worth $6.4 billion in 10 data center centric markets in the United States. Lightpath, a company specializing in all-fiber, infrastructure-driven connectivity, is transforming the way organizations establish their digital connections.

data.title: Jackson Hewitt introduces limited-edition Refund Jeans with big pockets for tax refund. Tax Refund Advance loan available all season.
data.description: Enter to win a pair of Refund Jeans and get a Tax Refund Advance loan throughout the year in SARASOTA, Florida. On January 15, 2026, Jackson Hewitt Tax Services® announced their unique offering for the tax season. As a reputable tax preparation service in the US, they are highlighting this special promotion.

data.title: Junipr PR named The Belfry House's agency of record; R-to-V to lead digital strategy. Luxury hotel in Lake Geneva selects new partners.
data.description: Latest Update on the Luxury Property Around Lake Geneva Highlights Integrated Brand StorytellingIn a recent development on January 15, 2026, The Belfry House, a prestigious luxury boutique hotel, renowned dining location, and music site close to Lake Geneva, Wisconsin, has partnered with Junipr Public for integrated brand storytelling.

data.title: Quest Global certified as Great Place To Work in the USA for 3rd year. Based on employee feedback. Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: In Windsor, Connecticut, on January 15, 2026, Quest Global, a prominent global engineering services company, proudly disclosed that it has received certification as a Great Place To Work® in the United States for the third consecutive year. This esteemed acknowledgment is solely dependent on the feedback provided by the employees.

data.title: The Ritz-Carlton, Amelia Island launches 7 signature experiences celebrating Amelia Island's story. Jan. 15, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 15, 2026, The Ritz-Carlton located on Amelia Island in Florida shared news of their innovative brand initiative. The luxury hotel has introduced seven new experiences focused on showcasing the unique narrative of Amelia Island, encompassing elements of culinary delights, wellness activities, and immersion in nature. Situated on a beautiful barrier island in Northeastern Florida, The Ritz-Carlton Amelia Island aims to enhance guest experiences by offering these distinct and engaging programs.

data.title: Escoffier extends Chef Kristen Kish's Chef-in-Residence role for 2026 with virtual mentoring, events, and podcast.
data.description: An acclaimed chef, nominated for two Emmys, is building on her successful debut year by extending her collaboration through virtual mentorship, campus activities, and a global tour on The Ultimate Dish podcast in 2026. The renowned chef's expanded partnership will include various engaging initiatives. This development was announced on January 15, 2026, in SCHAUMBURG, Ill. Lookout for exciting culinary opportunities led by the talented chef this year.

data.title: Joyce Farms introduces Signature Angus Heritage Beef program; premium beef raised in Blue Ridge Mtns.
data.description: A high-quality beef program called Signature Angus Heritage Beef has been introduced by Joyce Farms in Winston-Salem, North Carolina. The program was launched on January 15, 2026, and offers bold flavors and reliable performance. The beef is raised with integrity in the Blue Ridge Mountains. This new premium beef option is aimed at chefs and home consumers who are seeking top-notch quality.

data.title: Reshop streamlines refunds to boost sales & loyalty. Data shows strong adoption & revenue growth. Retail returns spike post-holidays, impacting merchants.
data.description: Reshop, a top instant refund and post-purchase platform, is tackling the rise in returns across the industry. Recent data released by the company highlights significant consumer acceptance and a notable revenue boost linked to instant refunds. With the increase in retail returns post-holiday season, managing refunds proves to be a challenge for merchants, leading to higher expenses and heightened fraud risks. The surge in returns is currently estimated at **% following the holiday shopping period, which emphasizes the need for efficient refund processes.

data.title: 79% of employees seek HR help monthly, but only 6% receive instant support. 1,000 UK employees surveyed, organizations with 2,000+ staff.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in London, a report on HR service trends for 2026 was published by Applaud. The report is based on research conducted with Censuswide among 1,000 employees in the UK. The participants were from organizations with over 2,000 employees. The study revealed a noticeable "service gap" concerning the frequency of...

data.title: Parloa valued at $3B, raises $350M in Series D funding. Over half a billion secured since 2022. Leader in Agentic AI for CX.
data.description: Parloa, a rapidly growing company based in New York and Berlin, has successfully raised over $500 million since 2022. On January 15, 2026, the leading provider of AI agents that enhance the customer experience in enterprises, disclosed that it has secured $350 million in Series D funding, further solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: KAS has seven partners named to 2026 Lawdragon 500 Leading Lawyers in America, including Kay Anderle and Chase Scolnick.
data.description: In Irvine, California on January 15, 2026, Keller Anderle Scolnick (KAS), a prominent boutique trial law firm, revealed that seven of its partners have been chosen for the prestigious 2026 Lawdragon 500 Leading Lawyers in America list. This accolade includes recognition for past honorees Kay Anderle and Chase Scolnick.

data.title: AFP welcomed 178 new Certified Corporate FP&A Professionals in 2025, expanding global network to 56 countries.
data.description: In January 15, 2026, it was reported that 178 individuals were welcomed as Certified Corporate FP&A Professional (FPAC) credential holders by the Association for Financial Professionals (AFP). These new members have joined a vast global network that connects finance professionals in 56 countries. This signifies the continued growth and recognition of the FPAC credential within the financial industry.
